raw_consumer_statement: XXXX a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX who was scammed by a company when trying to take my grandkids to the circus. I tried to get help from my bank but they denied my request. My adult son helped me put this together so hopefully someone can take a look and make this right. Im on a fixed income retirement and the amount of money Im out is important to me. I tried to buy shrine circus tickets online and thought I was dealing with the actual venue but was instead a company called tickets-center who charged 4 times the amount of tickets and then made it impossible for me to actually get access to the tickets. I wanted physical tickets and they said I had to do them on my phone. I couldnt get it to work and asked for a refund but was denied. I then went to the venue and told them what happened and bought actual tickets there for hundreds less. I thought Id be protected by my credit card on the purchase I was scammed on but Citibank denied me so now Im out a lot of money. I feel taken advantage of by my bank and the ticket company who scammed me. Looks like I wasnt the only one the better business bureau reviews are horrible. Please help!
